stories.summary: Search by title substring returned exactly 2 matching "Report" notes out of 3
Search by body substring "uniquedragon" returned exactly 1 matching note
Lowercase query "hiking" matched title "Hiking Trail"
Exact tag "urgent" returned 1 note; tag "work" returned 2 notes and excluded "workout"
Combined q=Tagged&tag=urgent returned only 1 note matching both criteria (AND logic)
Updated note "Sort First" appeared first in results after being updated last
Non-matching query returned empty array [], not an error
Create/Read/Update/Delete all work; delete returns 204, subsequent GET returns 404
All endpoints (list, search, tag filter) return 401 without auth token
User B cannot see User A's notes via search (0 results for both q= and tag= queries)
Searched q=Apple, returned only "Apple Pie Recipe" (1 of 3 notes)
Searched q=unicorn, matched note by body text "unicorn rainbow special"
Searched q=hiking (lowercase), matched "Hiking Trail" (mixed case)
tag=work returned only "Tagged1" (exact match), not "Tagged3" with tag "workout"
q=Meeting&tag=work returned only "Meeting Notes" (AND logic), excluded "Meeting Agenda" (tag=personal)
Updated first note appeared first in results, sorted by most recently updated descending
q=zzzznonexistent999 returned empty array []
Create/Read/Update/Delete all worked; 204 on delete; 404 after delete
All endpoints (notes, search with q, search with tag) returned 401 without auth token
User B's search for User A's notes (by title and tag) returned empty arrays
